'''basubu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:niahite|niahite]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| b-s-b
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:niahite|niahite]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| basubu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:bæsibith|bæsibith]] || [[word:bæsibij|bæsibij]] || [[word:bæsibish|bæsibish]] || [[word:bæsibi|bæsibi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:basusubuth|basusubuth]] || [[word:basusubuj|basusubuj]] || [[word:basusubush|basusubush]] || [[word:basusubu|basusubu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:basubuth|basubuth]] || [[word:basubuj|basubuj]] || [[word:basubush|basubush]] || [[word:basubu|basubu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:basufbuth|basufbuth]] || [[word:basufbuj|basufbuj]] || [[word:basufbush|basufbush]] || [[word:basufbuf|basufbuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:basubuthu|basubuthu]] || [[word:basubuju|basubuju]] || [[word:basubushu|basubushu]] || [[word:basubuku|basubuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:basubuth|basubuth]] || [[word:basubuj|basubuj]] || [[word:basubush|basubush]] || [[word:basubu|basubu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:basubuthul|basubuthul]] || [[word:basubujul|basubujul]] || [[word:basubushul|basubushul]] || [[word:basubukul|basubukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:basubuthuthu|basubuthuthu]] || [[word:basubujuju|basubujuju]] || [[word:basubushushu|basubushushu]] || [[word:basubuku|basubuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:basubuthun|basubuthun]] || [[word:basubujun|basubujun]] || [[word:basubushun|basubushun]] || [[word:basubukun|basubukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:basubuthuoro|basubuthuoro]] || [[word:basubujuoro|basubujuoro]] || [[word:basubushuoro|basubushuoro]] || [[word:basubukuoro|basubukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|5db7a01}}
